title: Other Sign Language Scripts and Their Conceptions
subtitle: ASL-phabet, HamNoSys, ASLwrite, and what they imply about written sign language
summary: Comparative writing-systems draft for the Writing and Representation in Sutton SignWriting series.
synopsis: This entry names a few visible other script conceptions as part of the surrounding field. It treats ASL-phabet, HamNoSys, and ASLwrite as distinct answers to different writing problems, and clarifies why SignWriting is understood here as plane-based writing with a broader public and technical path.
